violations.text: The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings throughout establishment. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the candy isle shelving has an accumulation of rodent droppings. Establishment to clean and sanitize all affected areas with rodent droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025
The floors in the back storage area has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025
Food was observed stored on the floor in the dry storage area and walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches off the ground. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2024
